text:
Commander IB PortfolioAnalyst report (2026-02-06 → 2026-04-27)
Account: individual US equities scalper | Ending NAV $2,084.55
Cumulative TWR: +35.03% | Sharpe 2.81 | Max DD 7.94%
Trading P&L (MTM): +$1,108.31 | Fees: −$317.20 (29% of MTM)
Turnover ~$73,789 bought / $74,900 sold | Ended 100% cash (flat)

KEY DISTINCTION FOR HALIM:
- Commander's "lottery" trades were NOT random gambling — calculated setups with ~80–97% conviction.
- Failures were human execution errors (hope-hold, no stop, wrong regime) — algo must avoid those.
- Bot must beat human: same turnover intent, less fee drag, no tail losses.
